description: Placeholder — run fetch_adoption.py or trigger the GitHub Actions workflow to populate with live data.

China.note: Data not yet fetched. Trigger the 'Update Adoption Data' GitHub Actions workflow.

primary_us.name: USASpending.gov
primary_us.note: Official US federal spending data. No API key required.

primary_cn.name: CCGP (中国政府采购网)
primary_cn.note: China central government procurement portal. Best-effort scrape.

methodology_note: Government procurement actions used as adoption proxy — stronger signal than mentions or job postings. US: USASpending.gov federal contract awards. China: CCGP central procurement notices (best-effort, may be blocked from non-Chinese IPs).
caveats: Scope asymmetry: US = federal only, China = central CCGP only. Transparency asymmetry: US data is far more automatable. China null count = data unavailable, not zero procurement.
